channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tom Brady explains why he has 'mixed emotions' after seeing Azeez Al-Shaair's brutal hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: Tom Brady gave his opinion on the Azeez Al-Shaair hit against Trevor Lawrence, which led to an NFL suspension, and he questioned why the defense is always the ones at fault.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Signing with Dodgers was really easy decision for 2-time Cy Young winner Blake Snell
item.description: Two-time Cy Young Award winner Blake Snell says it was a really easy decision to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Analysis: Getting benched may have been best thing that happened to Bryce Young, Anthony Richardson
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Getting benched may have been the best thing that happened to Bryce Young and Anthony Richardson. Both second-year quarterbacks are playing well since returning to the starting lineup.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USWNT beats Netherlands 2-1 in goalkeeper Alyssa Naeher's final match
item.description: Alyssa Naher made two critical saves in her final match for the United States, Lynn Williams scored the go-ahead goal in the 71st minute and the Americans beat the Netherlands 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Caitlin Clark responsible for more than quarter of WNBA revenue while making less than $80K, expert says
item.description: Finance professor Ryan Brewer estimates Caitlin Clark to be responsible for 26.5% of the WNBA's league-wide activity for the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High school recruiting isn't the only way to build a winner in the era of the transfer portal
item.description: Texas A&M signed the nation’s top-ranked recruiting class three years ago believing it had built a potential national title contender. Plenty of players from that heralded 2022 class could indeed be participating in the first 12-team College Football Playoff this month.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Texans' Azeez Al-Shaair suspended 3 games without pay after violent hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Houston's Azeez Al-Shaair was suspended by the NFL without pay for three games Tuesday for repeated violations of player safety rules following his violent hit to the head of Jacksonville's Trevor Lawrence, which led to a concussion.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nick Rimando elected to National Soccer Hall of Fame
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Former Real Salt Lake goalkeeper Nick Rimando has been elected to the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Rimando will be enshrined with the Class of 2025 on May 3, 2025 in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Miami in trouble as Alabama rises in the latest College Football Playoff rankings
item.description: Miami’s playoff hopes took a nosedive while Alabama’s got a boost in the last rankings before the College Football Playoff bracket is set next weekend.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tiger Woods has no firm answers on a deal with Saudis or his future as a player
item.description: Tiger Woods could not offer much of a timetable Tuesday on PGA Tour negotiations with the Saudi backers of LIV Golf or his own future as a player. Woods is the tournament host of the Hero World Challenge this week, and that's his only role at Albany Golf Club in the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: Ryggs Johnston goes from a tiny Montana town to Australian Open champion: Analysis
item.description: A pair of Americans delivered command performances halfway around the world during Thanksgiving week. One was Peter Uihlein, the former U.S. Amateur champion and two-time Walker Cup player, winning by five shots in Qatar on the Asian Tour.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Falcons make quarterback decision as Kirk Cousins' struggles continue in 3rd straight loss
item.description: After a four-interception game from Kirk Cousins, Atlanta Falcons head coach Raheem Morris already has a quarterback decision made ahead of Week 14.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trent Williams' wife annouces passing of newborn son
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers star left tackle Trent Williams' newborn son passed away last week, his wife Sondra announced on Instagram. Trenton O'Brien Williams Jr. died on the night of Nov. 24. Trenton was born prematurely as Sondra gave birth to her son after 35 weeks of pregnancy.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
